homepage.heroSubline: Restore your home's curb appeal with our expert pressure washing services. Serving Portland, Beaverton, and beyond.
aboutText: Calvin Power Washing started with a simple goal: to provide Portland homeowners with reliable and effective exterior cleaning solutions. We're not just another pressure washing company; we're your neighbors, committed to preserving the beauty and integrity of our community's homes.

We approach every project with meticulous attention to detail and a commitment to using environmentally responsible cleaning methods. Our team is fully trained and equipped to handle any surface, from delicate wood siding to tough concrete driveways, ensuring a thorough clean without causing damage.

We're proud to be part of the Portland community and actively support local initiatives. We believe in giving back and ensuring that our business contributes positively to the environment and the lives of our fellow residents.

valueProps.title: Experienced Professionals
valueProps.description: Our team has years of experience tackling the toughest cleaning challenges Portland's climate throws our way.

valueProps.title: Eco-Friendly Solutions
valueProps.description: We use biodegradable detergents and responsible water management practices to protect our environment.

valueProps.title: Comprehensive Cleaning
valueProps.description: From roofs to sidewalks, we clean every exterior surface with precision and care.

valueProps.title: Satisfaction Guaranteed
valueProps.description: We're not happy until you're completely satisfied with the results. If you're not, we'll make it right.

homepage.ctaSubline: Transform your home with our expert pressure washing services. Contact us now for a free estimate.

services.name: House Washing
services.shortDescription: Protect and beautify your home with our thorough house washing service.
services.description: Portland's damp climate breeds moss, mildew, and algae, which can damage your siding and diminish your home's curb appeal. Our house washing service removes these unsightly growths, preventing long-term damage and restoring your home's original luster. We use a soft washing technique that combines low-pressure water with specialized detergents to gently yet effectively clean all types of siding, including wood, vinyl, stucco, and brick. Our process eliminates harmful organisms at the source, providing a longer-lasting clean than traditional pressure washing methods. We pay close attention to detail, ensuring that every nook and cranny is thoroughly cleaned, from the eaves to the foundation. Our house washing service not only enhances your home's appearance but also protects your investment by preventing costly repairs down the road.
process: Inspection: We assess your home's exterior to identify areas of concern and determine the best cleaning approach.
Preparation: We protect your landscaping and cover any sensitive areas to prevent damage.
Application: We apply our specialized cleaning solution using a soft washing technique.
Rinsing: We carefully rinse away the solution, leaving your home clean and refreshed.
benefits: Extends the life of your siding

faq.question: What is soft washing?
faq.answer: Soft washing uses low pressure and specialized detergents to gently clean surfaces without causing damage. It's ideal for delicate siding materials like wood and stucco.

faq.question: How often should I have my house washed?
faq.answer: We recommend having your house washed every 1-2 years to prevent the buildup of harmful growths and maintain its appearance.

faq.question: Is your cleaning solution safe for plants and pets?
faq.answer: Yes, we use environmentally responsible cleaning solutions that are safe for plants, pets, and your family.

services.name: Roof Cleaning
services.shortDescription: Extend the life of your roof with our professional roof cleaning service.
services.description: A dirty roof not only detracts from your home's appearance but can also cause significant damage over time. Moss, algae, and lichen trap moisture, leading to wood rot and premature shingle deterioration. Our roof cleaning service removes these harmful growths, protecting your roof and extending its lifespan. We use a gentle, non-abrasive cleaning method that won't damage your shingles or tiles. Our team is experienced in cleaning all types of roofs, including asphalt shingles, cedar shakes, and tile roofs. We take extra precautions to protect your landscaping and ensure that all debris is properly disposed of. Investing in regular roof cleaning is a smart way to protect your investment and avoid costly repairs down the road. We understand the unique challenges posed by Portland's climate and are equipped to handle even the toughest roof cleaning jobs.
process: Inspection: We assess your roof's condition and identify areas of concern.
Treatment: We apply a specialized cleaning solution to kill moss, algae, and lichen.
Removal: We gently remove dead debris without causing damage to your roof.
Prevention: We offer preventative treatments to inhibit future growth.

faq.question: Will roof cleaning damage my shingles?
faq.answer: No, we use a gentle, non-abrasive cleaning method that won't damage your shingles or tiles.

faq.question: How often should I have my roof cleaned?
faq.answer: We recommend having your roof cleaned every 2-3 years, depending on the level of moss and algae growth.

faq.question: Is your roof cleaning solution safe for my landscaping?
faq.answer: Yes, we take precautions to protect your landscaping and use environmentally responsible cleaning solutions.

services.name: Driveway & Sidewalk Cleaning
services.shortDescription: Restore your concrete surfaces with our powerful driveway and sidewalk cleaning.
services.description: Driveways and sidewalks are often the first thing people notice about your home. Over time, they can become stained with oil, dirt, and grime, detracting from your home's overall appearance. Our driveway and sidewalk cleaning service removes these unsightly stains, restoring your concrete surfaces to their original beauty. We use high-pressure water and specialized cleaning solutions to effectively remove even the toughest stains. We also offer sealing services to protect your concrete surfaces from future damage. Our team is experienced in cleaning all types of concrete surfaces, including driveways, sidewalks, patios, and pool decks. We take pride in our work and are committed to providing our customers with exceptional results. A clean driveway and sidewalk not only enhance your home's curb appeal but also improve safety by removing slippery algae and moss.
process: Pre-Treatment: We apply a degreaser or stain remover to heavily soiled areas.
Pressure Washing: We use high-pressure water to blast away dirt, grime, and stains.
Post-Treatment: We apply a sealant to protect your concrete surfaces (optional).
Inspection: We ensure no spots were missed.

faq.question: Will pressure washing damage my concrete?
faq.answer: No, we use the appropriate pressure settings and techniques to clean your concrete surfaces without causing damage.

faq.question: How often should I have my driveway and sidewalk cleaned?
faq.answer: We recommend having your driveway and sidewalk cleaned every 1-2 years, depending on the level of staining and dirt buildup.

faq.question: Do you offer sealing services?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer sealing services to protect your concrete surfaces from future damage and staining.

services.name: Deck & Fence Cleaning
services.shortDescription: Revitalize your outdoor living spaces with our deck and fence cleaning service.
services.description: Decks and fences are exposed to the elements year-round, making them susceptible to dirt, grime, and mildew. Our deck and fence cleaning service removes these unsightly growths, restoring your outdoor living spaces to their original beauty. We use a gentle cleaning method that won't damage your wood or composite materials. We also offer staining and sealing services to protect your deck and fence from future damage. Our team is experienced in cleaning all types of decks and fences, including wood, composite, and vinyl. We take pride in our work and are committed to providing our customers with exceptional results. A clean deck and fence not only enhance your home's curb appeal but also create a more inviting and enjoyable outdoor living space. We cater to the specific needs of Portland homes, understanding the challenges of damp weather and the importance of proper maintenance.
process: Inspection: We assess your deck and fence to determine the best cleaning approach.
Preparation: We protect your landscaping and cover any sensitive areas.
Cleaning: We apply a specialized cleaning solution using a low-pressure washing technique.
Rinsing: We carefully rinse away the solution, leaving your deck and fence clean and refreshed.
benefits: Extends the life of your deck and fence

faq.question: Will cleaning damage my wood deck?
faq.answer: No, we use a gentle cleaning method that won't damage your wood or composite materials.

faq.question: Do you offer staining and sealing services?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer staining and sealing services to protect your deck and fence from future damage.

faq.question: How often should I have my deck and fence cleaned?
faq.answer: We recommend having your deck and fence cleaned every 1-2 years, depending on the level of dirt and mildew buildup.

services.name: Gutter Cleaning
services.shortDescription: Protect your home from water damage with our professional gutter cleaning service.
services.description: Clogged gutters can lead to serious water damage, including roof leaks, foundation problems, and damaged siding. Our gutter cleaning service removes leaves, debris, and other obstructions, ensuring that your gutters are functioning properly. We also inspect your gutters for damage and make recommendations for repairs. Our team is experienced in cleaning all types of gutters, including aluminum, vinyl, and copper. We take extra precautions to protect your landscaping and ensure that all debris is properly disposed of. Investing in regular gutter cleaning is a smart way to protect your home from costly water damage. We understand the importance of properly functioning gutters in Portland's rainy climate and are committed to providing our customers with reliable and effective gutter cleaning services.
process: Removal: We remove all leaves, debris, and other obstructions from your gutters.
Flushing: We flush your gutters with water to ensure they are flowing freely.
Inspection: We inspect your gutters for damage and make recommendations for repairs.
Cleanup: We clean up any debris that falls to the ground.
benefits: Extends the life of your gutters

faq.question: How often should I have my gutters cleaned?
faq.answer: We recommend having your gutters cleaned at least twice a year, especially in the spring and fall.

faq.question: Do you offer gutter repair services?
faq.answer: Yes, we can inspect your gutters for damage and make recommendations for repairs.

faq.question: Can clogged gutters cause foundation problems?
faq.answer: Yes, clogged gutters can cause water to overflow and pool around your foundation, leading to serious damage.

services.name: Commercial Pressure Washing
services.shortDescription: Maintain a clean and professional image with our commercial pressure washing services.
services.description: First impressions matter. A clean and well-maintained commercial property projects professionalism and attracts customers. We offer comprehensive commercial pressure washing services for businesses of all sizes in the Portland metro area. From storefronts and sidewalks to parking lots and building exteriors, we'll keep your property looking its best. We use powerful equipment and specialized cleaning solutions to remove dirt, grime, graffiti, and other unsightly stains. We understand the importance of minimizing disruption to your business and will work around your schedule to ensure a seamless cleaning process. Investing in regular commercial pressure washing is a smart way to protect your property and enhance your brand image. We're committed to providing our commercial clients with reliable, efficient, and cost-effective cleaning solutions.
process: Assessment: We assess your property to determine the scope of work and identify areas of concern.
Preparation: We protect any sensitive areas and take precautions to minimize disruption to your business.
Cleaning: We use high-pressure water and specialized cleaning solutions to remove dirt, grime, and stains.
Rinsing: We carefully rinse away the solution, leaving your property clean and refreshed.

faq.question: Do you offer after-hours cleaning services?
faq.answer: Yes, we can schedule cleaning services to minimize disruption to your business operations.

faq.question: What types of commercial properties do you clean?
faq.answer: We clean a wide range of commercial properties, including storefronts, office buildings, restaurants, and warehouses.

faq.question: Are your cleaning solutions safe for the environment?
faq.answer: Yes, we use environmentally responsible cleaning solutions whenever possible.

services.name: Graffiti Removal
services.shortDescription: Quickly and effectively remove graffiti from your property.
services.description: Graffiti can be a major eyesore and can negatively impact your property's value. Our graffiti removal service utilizes specialized equipment and cleaning solutions to quickly and effectively remove graffiti from a variety of surfaces, including brick, concrete, metal, and wood. We understand the urgency of graffiti removal and offer prompt service to minimize the impact on your property. Our team is experienced in handling all types of graffiti, from spray paint to markers. We take pride in restoring your property to its original condition. Don't let graffiti detract from your property's appearance – contact us today for fast and reliable graffiti removal services. We service all of Portland and surrounding areas, ensuring a quick response to any graffiti situation.
process: Assessment: We assess the type of graffiti and the surface it's on to determine the best removal method.
Application: We apply a specialized graffiti remover to the affected area.
Removal: We use pressure washing or manual scrubbing to remove the graffiti.
Cleanup: We clean up any residue and ensure the area is restored to its original condition.

faq.question: How quickly can you remove graffiti?
faq.answer: We offer prompt service and can often remove graffiti within 24-48 hours.

faq.question: Can you remove graffiti from any surface?
faq.answer: We can remove graffiti from a variety of surfaces, including brick, concrete, metal, and wood.

faq.question: Is your graffiti removal service safe for the environment?
faq.answer: We use environmentally responsible cleaning solutions whenever possible.

serviceAreas.content:
Calvin Power Washing is proud to serve the residents and businesses of Beaverton, Oregon! With a population of approximately 100,000, Beaverton is known for its established neighborhoods featuring many 1970s and 80s suburban ranch-style homes. These homes, while charming, can accumulate moss, algae, and dirt over time due to the Pacific Northwest's mild, wet winters. Regular pressure washing helps maintain their curb appeal and prevent damage from the elements.

We understand the specific needs of Beaverton homeowners. Our team is experienced in safely and effectively cleaning various surfaces, including siding, roofs, driveways, and decks. We use eco-friendly cleaning solutions to protect your property and the environment. We're committed to providing top-notch service and ensuring your satisfaction.
serviceAreas.localContext: Beaverton's mature neighborhoods with their classic ranch homes are particularly susceptible to moss and algae growth due to the region's climate.

serviceAreas.content:
Calvin Power Washing is dedicated to providing exceptional pressure washing services in Hillsboro, Oregon. As a hub of the Silicon Forest, Hillsboro boasts a growing population of around 110,000 and features newer housing developments alongside established neighborhoods. The area's climate, characterized by mild, wet winters, can lead to the build-up of grime and organic growth on exterior surfaces.

Whether you own a modern home in a new development or a classic residence, Calvin Power Washing has the expertise and equipment to tackle your cleaning needs. We offer a range of services, including house washing, roof cleaning, driveway cleaning, and deck restoration. Our team is committed to delivering outstanding results and exceeding your expectations.
serviceAreas.localContext: Hillsboro's blend of newer and older homes, combined with the area's wet climate, creates diverse pressure washing needs.

reviews.name: Sarah M.
reviews.text: Calvin Power Washing did an amazing job on our house! Our siding was covered in moss and algae, and now it looks brand new. The team was professional, efficient, and very careful with our landscaping. Highly recommend!

reviews.name: David K.
reviews.text: Our driveway was a mess with oil stains and dirt. Calvin Power Washing came out and completely transformed it. It looks so much better now! I only gave 4 stars because there was a slight delay in scheduling, but the work itself was excellent.

reviews.name: Emily L.
reviews.text: We had a lot of moss growing on our roof, and we were worried about damage. Calvin Power Washing cleaned it all off without any issues. They were very professional and explained the whole process to us. Great service!

reviews.name: Thomas B.
reviews.text: Our gutters were completely clogged with leaves and debris. Calvin Power Washing cleaned them out quickly and efficiently. They also inspected them for damage and gave us some helpful tips for maintenance. Will definitely use them again!

reviews.name: Jessica P.
reviews.text: Our deck was covered in mildew and grime. Calvin Power Washing came out and made it look brand new. They were very careful with our plants and furniture. We're so happy with the results!

reviews.name: Michael S.
reviews.text: We hired Calvin Power Washing to clean the exterior of our storefront. They did a great job removing graffiti and grime. Our building looks much more inviting now. We'll be using them for regular maintenance.
